'''Tililix''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Til system/Legends|Til system]] of the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] which [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the star [[Til]]. It was the [[Tarro]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] before it was destroyed when Til went [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]].
